sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n57084" key="khki/balos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κηκίβαλος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, kind of <sense id="n57084.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">shell-fish</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0521.tlg001:42:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Epich.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">42.2</biblScope> </bibl> (leg. <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">κικ</itype>-, cf. <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κικοβαυλιτίδες</orth>).</sense> </entryFree>
